sources_analyzed: project name (cashu-mint implies Cashu protocol mint implementation)
researcher_output.json (protocol context, mandatory NUTs, core components)
Cashu NUT specifications (NUT-00 through NUT-06 mandatory, NUT-07+ optional)

gaps.requirement: NUT-00: Blind Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange cryptographic engine
gaps.current_state: No source code exists. Zero cryptographic primitives implemented (hash_to_curve, blind, sign_blinded, unblind, verify).
No HTTP server or endpoint exists. Wallets cannot discover mint signing keys.
No keyset generation, persistence, rotation, or fee configuration exists.
No swap logic exists. Users cannot split/merge tokens.

gaps.requirement: NUT-04: Minting tokens via Lightning (POST /v1/mint/quote/bolt11, POST /v1/mint/bolt11)
gaps.current_state: No mint quote creation, Lightning invoice generation, or token issuance flow exists.

gaps.requirement: NUT-05: Melting tokens via Lightning (POST /v1/melt/quote/bolt11, POST /v1/melt/bolt11)
gaps.current_state: No melt quote creation, proof verification, or Lightning payment execution exists.
No info endpoint exists. Wallets cannot discover mint capabilities.

gaps.requirement: REST API HTTP server with routing
gaps.current_state: No web framework, server, or routing exists. No code at all.

gaps.requirement: Database / persistence layer for keysets, proofs, quotes
gaps.current_state: No database schema, migrations, ORM, or storage layer exists.
No Lightning client, invoice creation, or payment execution exists.

gaps.requirement: Double-spend prevention (spent proof tracking with atomic check-and-mark)
gaps.current_state: No spent-proofs store or TOCTOU-safe verification exists.
No endpoint exists. Wallets cannot verify if tokens are still spendable.
No fee return logic in melt flow. Users overpay fees with no recourse.

gaps.requirement: NUT-12: DLEQ proofs for offline signature verification
gaps.current_state: No DLEQ proof generation in blind signature responses.

gaps.requirement: NUT-17: WebSocket subscriptions for real-time quote updates
gaps.current_state: No WebSocket endpoint or subscription model exists.

gaps.requirement: Operator configuration system (env vars, config file)
gaps.current_state: No configuration layer exists for Lightning credentials, database URL, fees, etc.
No quote lifecycle management or expiry cleanup exists.
No restore endpoint for wallet recovery.
No spending condition parsing or P2PK verification in proof validation.
No BIP-32-style deterministic secret support.
No payment method advertising in info or quote responses.
No tests of any kind exist. Zero test coverage.

gaps.requirement: Admin and monitoring (health check, metrics, keyset rotation tools)
gaps.current_state: No admin interface, health endpoint, or metrics export exists.

gaps.requirement: README, OpenAPI spec, operator setup guide
gaps.current_state: No documentation of any kind exists.

context.recommendation: This is a greenfield project with 0% implementation coverage. All 11 P0 gaps must be addressed before the mint is functional. Recommended build order: (1) Choose tech stack and bootstrap project, (2) NUT-00 crypto engine (BDHKE), (3) Database layer with keyset/proof/quote tables, (4) REST API server with routing, (5) NUT-01/02 keyset management and key endpoints, (6) NUT-03 token swap with double-spend prevention, (7) Lightning backend integration, (8) NUT-04 minting flow, (9) NUT-05 melting flow, (10) NUT-06 info endpoint, (11) Configuration system. Then tackle P1 gaps (NUT-07, NUT-08, NUT-12, NUT-17, quote state machine). Reference implementations: Python (cashubtc/nutshell), Rust (cashubtc/cdk), Go (elnosh/gonuts).
